Prompt: The national animal depicted on Australia's coat of arms
Reference Caption: Red kangaroo and emu pair (only country with two official national animals)
Assessment Point: Australia's coat of arms features the red kangaroo and emu as its official national animals, chosen because neither can easily walk backward, symbolizing a nation that moves forward.
